channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: Late goals. Heartbreak. Penalty disasters. The World Cup kno…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description:
Late goals. Heartbreak. Penalty disasters. The World Cup knockout stage has delivered everything — including a dramatic US win.

Check out Pitchside for all the latest from on and off the pitch reut.rs/4wijWR9
item.content:encoded:
Late goals. Heartbreak. Penalty disasters. The World Cup knockout stage has delivered everything — including a dramatic US win.

item.title: When it's just too hot to turn on an oven or stove, these re…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: When it's just too hot to turn on an oven or stove, these recipes will make your day. nyti.ms/4gRtspX

item.title: Drive a UPS truck for 23 years, and you pick up a tip or two…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description:
Drive a UPS truck for 23 years, and you pick up a tip or two on how to conquer heat waves.

From packing pickles in your lunch to using high-tech towels, here’s how you can navigate the heat like a veteran UPS driver: 🔗 on.wsj.com/4gkQghD
item.content:encoded:
Drive a UPS truck for 23 years, and you pick up a tip or two on how to conquer heat waves.

From packing pickles in your lunch to using high-tech towels, here’s how you can navigate the heat like a veteran UPS driver: 🔗 on.wsj.com/4gkQghD

item.title: にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧…
item.author: ねこぱすー@sync (@aria-sync.bsky.social)
item.description:
にゃんぱすー🐈🐾🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧 🫧🪼🫧🐬🫧🐳🫧🐋‪🫧
おはようございますんฅ⸃⸃🐾🐾
今日は朝から涼しい風が気持ちいいので今でも寝そう( ¯꒳​¯ )ᐝな所(*´ω｀*)
きんキラキラキラ金曜日なん🫓
今日も一日頑張るぞいو( ˙꒳˙ )٩
#おはようございます
#イマソラ
#空の向こう

item.title: パリのカフェで 建築設計士と数学教師が出会って らくがき交換してるうちに絵本ができて結婚するの パリすぎてくらくらしませ…
item.author: ちろ (@tirolean.bsky.social)
item.description: パリのカフェで 建築設計士と数学教師が出会って らくがき交換してるうちに絵本ができて結婚するの パリすぎてくらくらしませんか 現在に至る じゃあないんだよ 映画化しろ

item.title: An Israeli artificial intelligence startup is betting that e…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: An Israeli artificial intelligence startup is betting that election victories by Trump-aligned leaders across Latin America will boost demand for its government-focused cybersecurity products.
item.content:encoded: An Israeli artificial intelligence startup is betting that election victories by Trump-aligned leaders across Latin America will boost demand for its government-focused cybersecurity products.

item.title: It's been called one of, if not the biggest VAR decision in …
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: It's been called one of, if not the biggest VAR decision in World Cup history. Whatever you call it, it was one that left Croatia heartbroken and Portugal thanking its lucky stars. https://cnn.it/4y3Gres
item.content:encoded: It's been called one of, if not the biggest VAR decision in World Cup history. Whatever you call it, it was one that left Croatia heartbroken and Portugal thanking its lucky stars. https://cnn.it/4y3Gres

item.title: An exclusive look inside GE Vernova’s largest gas turbine pl…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description:
An exclusive look inside GE Vernova’s largest gas turbine plant in Greenville, South Carolina, offers fresh evidence that the artificial intelligence boom is going strong.

Read the full story: cnb.cx/4oVVCC8
item.content:encoded:
An exclusive look inside GE Vernova’s largest gas turbine plant in Greenville, South Carolina, offers fresh evidence that the artificial intelligence boom is going strong.

item.title: A commercial pilot awoke in the middle of the night last Aug…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: A commercial pilot awoke in the middle of the night last August to a swarm of bats in his Denver hotel room, a lawsuit claims. He was treated for possible rabies exposure after one bit him on the foot. nyti.ms/4y3rSYm
item.content:encoded: A commercial pilot awoke in the middle of the night last August to a swarm of bats in his Denver hotel room, a lawsuit claims. He was treated for possible rabies exposure after one bit him on the foot. nyti.ms/4y3rSYm

item.title: Whether you own or rent your home, knowing how to shut off y…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Whether you own or rent your home, knowing how to shut off your power and your pipes — and then turn them back on — is a matter of safety and practicality, especially in an emergency. Here's how to do it yourself. trib.al/KFhV6v6
item.content:encoded: Whether you own or rent your home, knowing how to shut off your power and your pipes — and then turn them back on — is a matter of safety and practicality, especially in an emergency. Here's how to do it yourself. trib.al/KFhV6v6

item.title: ‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤 ‎ ‎ワシは… ‎アメリカ時間に ‎起きてる必要がある ‎ ‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から …
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎びっくり爆睡したぞ😴💤
‎
‎ワシは…
‎アメリカ時間に
‎起きてる必要がある
‎
‎その為に寝るのは朝5時から
‎３時間の睡眠を長年続けてる…
‎
‎それが今朝は…
‎びっくり5時間睡眠だよ〜😱
‎
‎まだ寝れたのに…
‎
‎家電☎️が鳴り響き…
‎起こされた！
‎
‎は～い！もしもし…
‎
‎『良かった！何してたのよ！』
‎
‎長女からだ…
‎
‎枕元のスマホを見ると…
‎LINEに
‎娘達のメッセージがズラリと…
‎
‎
‎『心配させないでよ🥹』と…
‎
‎長女の半泣き声を聞いたら
‎
‎ワシ…
‎寝たら悪いかなぁ〜と反省😂
‎
‎

item.author: Kouyou Kojima * コジマコウヨウ (@kouyou1-6.bsky.social)

item.title: He walked into a shelter to pick a cat. The cat had other pl…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: He walked into a shelter to pick a cat. The cat had other plans, climbed right up, and picked him instead.
item.content:encoded: He walked into a shelter to pick a cat. The cat had other plans, climbed right up, and picked him instead.

item.title: 血糖値の乱高下が生活に及ぼす悪影響について最近よくお見かけするけれど、 なんかそういうポストってやたらにたんぱく質の摂…
item.author: 吟鳥子 Gintoriko (@gintoriko.bsky.social)
item.description:
血糖値の乱高下が生活に及ぼす悪影響について最近よくお見かけするけれど、

なんかそういうポストってやたらにたんぱく質の摂取をおすすめしてるね？ブームなのかな

個人的には自分は、朝弁当の内容をきっちりして3時間ごとにきっちりした少食を摂るようになってから午前中からかなり稼働できるようになったのだけれど、

たんぱく質重視というよりは、

野菜／肉魚／炭水化物の全部そろえて、ごく少食で3・4時間ごとに食べるのがおすすめかなあ

なんで世の中は今こんなに朝のたんぱく質推しなんだろう… 企業が朝プロテインでも大々的に売り込む伏線を敷いてるのかな
item.content:encoded:
血糖値の乱高下が生活に及ぼす悪影響について最近よくお見かけするけれど、

なんかそういうポストってやたらにたんぱく質の摂取をおすすめしてるね？ブームなのかな

個人的には自分は、朝弁当の内容をきっちりして3時間ごとにきっちりした少食を摂るようになってから午前中からかなり稼働できるようになったのだけれど、

たんぱく質重視というよりは、

野菜／肉魚／炭水化物の全部そろえて、ごく少食で3・4時間ごとに食べるのがおすすめかなあ

なんで世の中は今こんなに朝のたんぱく質推しなんだろう… 企業が朝プロテインでも大々的に売り込む伏線を敷いてるのかな

item.title: 『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳 早川書房）を御紹介します。 n…
item.author: Katz@PanTraductia (@katzptd.bsky.social)
item.description:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。
item.content:encoded:
『幻想と怪奇』noteを更新しました。今回は、エリン・E・アダムス『贄の森』（岩瀬徳子訳　早川書房）を御紹介します。
note.com/fancy_lion71...
なお、7月は水曜日が5日あるので、来週8日は休載します。次回の更新は15日になります。

item.content:encoded:

item.title: I'll summarize this: Mamdani asked NYers to keep air conditi…
item.author: Jason Scott (@textfiles.com)
item.description:
I'll summarize this: Mamdani asked NYers to keep air conditioning at 78 degrees. A wave criticism hit online. A MSNBC broadcast pointed out the US Department of Energy recommends that 78 degree figure.

Immediately after, the US Department of Energy deleted 6,000 web pages related to energy saving.
item.content:encoded:
I'll summarize this: Mamdani asked NYers to keep air conditioning at 78 degrees. A wave criticism hit online. A MSNBC broadcast pointed out the US Department of Energy recommends that 78 degree figure.

Immediately after, the US Department of Energy deleted 6,000 web pages related to energy saving.

item.title: A Belarus court sentenced journalist and YouTube host Kiryl …
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
A Belarus court sentenced journalist and YouTube host Kiryl Pazniak to 3.5 years in jail on charges of discrediting Belarus and forming an extremist group (Yuras Karmanau/Associated Press)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
A Belarus court sentenced journalist and YouTube host Kiryl Pazniak to 3.5 years in jail on charges of discrediting Belarus and forming an extremist group (Yuras Karmanau/Associated Press)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: Peacock spiders are only 4mm long, but their courtship dance…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: Peacock spiders are only 4mm long, but their courtship dance rivals any bird of paradise. Australia has over 90 species of these tiny, ultra-colorful performers.
item.content:encoded: Peacock spiders are only 4mm long, but their courtship dance rivals any bird of paradise. Australia has over 90 species of these tiny, ultra-colorful performers.

item.title: Bumpy hasn't been in our care long, but he has already bonde…
item.author: Sheldrick Wildlife Trust (@sheldricktrust.bsky.social)
item.description: Bumpy hasn't been in our care long, but he has already bonded quickly with his Keepers, Festus and Jackson. He peeks above the water to watch their comings and goings and loves to nestle between their feet. A forehead scratch is always well received too, thank you very much.
item.content:encoded: Bumpy hasn't been in our care long, but he has already bonded quickly with his Keepers, Festus and Jackson. He peeks above the water to watch their comings and goings and loves to nestle between their feet. A forehead scratch is always well received too, thank you very much.

item.title: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth addr…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.
item.content:encoded: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani delivered his July Fourth address from behind George Washington's desk at City Hall. He was joined by recently naturalized U.S. citizens as he highlighted the ideals the founders of the nation put forward 250 years ago.

item.title: #Poetry #Painting #Morality The good and the evil are happe…
item.author: Art & Nature (@capecodfairytales.bsky.social)
item.description:
#Poetry #Painting #Morality

The good and the evil are happening concurrently.
The choice to focus on the good is itself
a way to defy the evil.

-Jared K Anderson

🎨 Claude Monet
item.content:encoded:
#Poetry #Painting #Morality

The good and the evil are happening concurrently.
The choice to focus on the good is itself
a way to defy the evil.

-Jared K Anderson

🎨 Claude Monet

item.title: Fact: 80% of terrestrial biodiversity lives in forests. When…
item.author: Abilu Tangwa. (@abilutangwa.bsky.social)
item.description: Fact: 80% of terrestrial biodiversity lives in forests. When trees vanish, species vanish.
item.content:encoded: Fact: 80% of terrestrial biodiversity lives in forests. When trees vanish, species vanish.

item.title: The Supreme Court dealt Big Brother a blow on Monday with a …
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
The Supreme Court dealt Big Brother a blow on Monday with a landmark ruling for digital privacy rights in Chatrie v. United States.

Justices agreed 6-3 that police need a warrant to search your location data.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court dealt Big Brother a blow on Monday with a landmark ruling for digital privacy rights in Chatrie v. United States.

Justices agreed 6-3 that police need a warrant to search your location data.

item.title: Our sweet Bean has crossed the rainbow bridge and our hearts…
item.author: Margot Foley (@mfoley25.bsky.social)
item.description: Our sweet Bean has crossed the rainbow bridge and our hearts are broken. It was a tough decision to let her go, but the last two years have been hard on her with hip dysplasia and bladder cancer and we know we made the right decision. She was such a fun, happy dog and we will miss her terribly. 💔🐾🐾🌈
item.content:encoded: Our sweet Bean has crossed the rainbow bridge and our hearts are broken. It was a tough decision to let her go, but the last two years have been hard on her with hip dysplasia and bladder cancer and we know we made the right decision. She was such a fun, happy dog and we will miss her terribly. 💔🐾🐾🌈

item.title: Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they …
item.author: Dr. Redfern Jon Barrett (@redfernjon.bsky.social)
item.description:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!
item.content:encoded:
Before you get snobbish about e-readers, remember that they allow large text for those with sight disabilities, alternate fonts for those with dyslexia, and can be laid down flat for those lacking mobility in their hands.

That last point is especially helpful for me right now.

Go e-readers!

item.title: NEW: Geraldo Lunas Campos repeatedly raised concerns about h…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: Geraldo Lunas Campos repeatedly raised concerns about his mental health before he died at Camp East Montana.

Records paint a portrait of how the Texas facility's staff failed to adequately respond.

with @texastribune.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: Geraldo Lunas Campos repeatedly raised concerns about his mental health before he died at Camp East Montana.

Records paint a portrait of how the Texas facility's staff failed to adequately respond.

item.title: Borja Iglesias, delantero de la selección: "Decir que los fu…
item.author: Fonsi Loaiza (@fonsiloaizap.bsky.social)
item.description: Borja Iglesias, delantero de la selección: "Decir que los futbolistas no podemos hablar de política también es politizar el fútbol. Somos parte de la sociedad. Para criticar el fútbol femenino dicen que ellas no generan lo mismo. Pero Alexia Putellas genera más que yo"
